abilities: We will shield you. For now.
I will tear victory from your grasp. (self and hostile)
I will speak to you in the language you understand: violence. (self and hostile)
Now, do you see your error? (self and hostile)
Your miscalculations will cost you everything. (self and hostile)
They will target me. Let them. (allies)
Oh, dear. Did you miss? (blocking Cassidy 's Deadeye)
You really should be more careful with your toys. (blocking D.Va 's Self-Destruct)
Trash, shooting trash. (blocking Roadhog 's Whole Hog)
We will take everything from you! (hostile)
Suffer, as I have! (self and hostile)
chatter: We will have peace at any cost.
For the moment, we have a common purpose. Let's... focus on that.
Now, you will see how war can be waged and won.
This will not be won without sacrifice. Be ready.
Watch for their weaknesses, and strike.
We will not lose this battle if we fight as one.
What matters is that we fight. To the very last second.
Do not falter, and we will not fail.
The path ahead is a hard one, but we will walk it.
The battle is all but won.
Fight with me! Fight until you fall!
This time, we will have them.
A battle lost for a war won.
I will break before I yield.
I would face death a thousand times, if it saved my people.
Their confidence will be their undoing.
They paid a high price to delay me. *chuckle* (eliminated after getting a multi-kill)
They will not be ready for us.
Now do you understand my grand design?
I knew you could not let me fall.
One of our enemies is being revived!
This is not my victory. It is ours.
call-outs: A sniper is nearby. Take cover!
Find cover and hold. We have almost won!
Hold this position, and we will be victorious!
If we protect one another, we will win this!
Charge with me! Our time is running out!
We are out of time. Attack!
eliminations: A necessary elimination.
And so you fall.
Another casualty. What a pity.
Enough of you.
Inevitable.
Inexorable triumph.
Missteps punished.
Stay down.
This was your best effort?
Was it worth it?
You are finished.
You were warned.
Return to your rest. (eliminating Bastion )
I'm afraid you've lost my attention. (eliminating Doomfist )
Weak, after all. (eliminating Doomfist )
Your scheming ends now. (eliminating Doomfist )
Not advanced enough, it seems. (eliminating Echo )
Conviction is nothing without a cause. (eliminating Freja )
How is it, being outdone by a "bot"? (eliminating Freja )
And that is the end of my brother's pet-human. (eliminating Genji )
My brother pitied you. I do not. (eliminating Genji )
Your performative servitude sickens me. (eliminating Genji )
Your righteousness is misplaced. (eliminating Hazard )
You have preyed on my people for the last time. (eliminating Junker Queen )
No matter where you come from, you are only human. (eliminating Juno )
All that muscle, and it still isn't enough. (eliminating Mauga )
I truly had no quarrel with you. I'm sorry. (eliminating Orisa )
You should have joined me. (eliminating Orisa )
I expected more from the fabled Crusaders. (eliminating Reinhardt )
Your rage will consume you. (eliminating Vendetta )
And now, Mondatta 's lessons have betrayed you, too. (eliminating Zenyatta )
I wish you would have joined me, brother. (eliminating Zenyatta )
I'm sorry, brother. (eliminating Zenyatta )
Someone's forgotten our lessons. (eliminating Zenyatta )
You must learn to block, brother! (eliminating Zenyatta )
You should have joined me, brother. (eliminating Zenyatta )
Disintegrated.
Melted down.
You have been consumed.
You shouldn't have pressed me! (on low HP)
Oh. Did someone clip your wings? (eliminating airborne enemy)
Such spectacle, and for what? (shutting down any ultimate)
Was that all? (shutting down any ultimate)
Stay down this time. (eliminating recently resurrected hero)
So fast, so careless. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Should have kept your distance. (close-range elimination)
Ninjas should be neither seen nor heard. (eliminating Genji using Dragon Blade)
A rather pathetic crescendo. (eliminating Lúcio using Sound Barrier)
Don't presume to judge me. (eliminating Orisa using Terra Surge)
Speak not of justice to me, human! (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
By all means! Keep charging in! (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
You and your visor are obsolete! (eliminating Soldier: 76 using Tactical Visor)
Try looking before you leap! (eliminating Winston using Jump Pack)
Another one falls.
You wage a war you cannot win.
Such overwhelming power! (while Nano-Boosted)
Against all odds, I will prevail!
An efficient tactic, that.
Multiple targets eliminated.
Nothing but ashes remain.
The battlefield is ours.
Ah, that was satisfying.
Choose your enemies more carefully next time.
Did you hope I had forgotten?
Did you think me forgiving?
Careless. Do better.
Do not react. Anticipate.
You may not be so fortunate next time.
I have you, Zenyatta. (to Zenyatta )
I told you to trust me, brother. (to Zenyatta )
Enough!
Fall down. Stay down.
Simplicity itself.
You were foolish to get so close.
You taught me that one. (eliminating Zenyatta )
Clawed my way back. (melee kill after being resurrected)
Absurd, but effective.
*tch tch tch* Careless.
I honestly didn't think that would work.
Enemy turret destroyed. They are vulnerable!
A clever blow!
Effective!
Strike them all down. No quarter!
They fall before us!
Well executed.
Your strategies are intriguing.
Now, imagine what you could accomplish unshackled from that human . (to Ashe , eliminating enemy with B.O.B. )
You truly were made for this. (to Bastion )
And that is how we rise above our programming. (to Orisa )
So you are capable of violence, after all. (to Zenyatta )
interactions: Ashe: I better not see your face in my neck of the woods. Ramattra: Are you afraid I'll free your servant? Ashe: Lay one finger on B.O.B. and I'll show you what fear means.
Ashe: Can't imagine what kind of bounty they'd put on your head. Ramattra: I'm afraid I don't pay much attention to humanity's laws. Ashe: Look at that, we got something in common.
Baptiste: You sure you want me keeping you alive? I am a human, after all. Ramattra: A helpful human would certainly be a welcome change of pace.
Ramattra: You appear to have a... bird following you. Why? Bastion: (explanatory beeps) Ramattra: Interesting. Well, if I see any twigs, I will let you know.
Brigitte: Papa, is there anything you'd like to say to our teammates? Torbjörn: I'm... looking forward to working with you. Ramattra: How gracious of you. Torbjörn: Yes, well... Let's get this done.
Ramattra: It is the privilege of humanity to trifle with every threat. D.Va: I give everything to protect my home . So, don't trifle with me.
Ramattra: Are you satisfied following humans around like an observant pet? Echo: There's no shame in learning from others. Try it sometime!

Echo : You are an R-7000 unit. The ones humans call... um... Ramattra : Ravagers, yes. "Squad killers." And... ruder things. Echo : Does it trouble you, being so feared and hated? Ramattra : Once. Now, it gives me a warm little feeling inside.

Ramattra : It's a shame none of us have ever met Aurora , your predecessor. Echo : I hear that often. *(clears throat)* What would you have asked her? Ramattra : The same thing I ask her every day. I wish she could answer.
Echo : Can you tell me what you remember of your Awakening? Ramattra : It came to me in New York, on a battlefield, I barely survived.

Echo : Why did you choose the name " Null Sector "? Ramattra : Because we defy the numbers humans gave us. We are zeroes, undefined. Echo : Is that not its own struggle? Ramattra : Of course, I expect you know that better than anyone.

Ramattra : You call my people "bots", yet you now take orders from one. Freja : Max isn't my boss. I call the shots as much as he does. Ramattra : Your self-importance is irksome, but impressively, your denial may be worse.

Ramattra : So, you work with Maximilien . I am amazed even a human can tolerate him. Freja : And here, I thought you fought for all omnics... Ramattra : He cares nothing for our people and lives only to enrich himself. I suppose you have that in common.

Ramattra : So, you've found your quarry at last, hunter. Another paragon of Overwatch , reduced to a villainous mercenary. Freja : It's not like that! He isn't himself right now. Ramattra : Nor were my people 'themselves' during the Crisis . But would you afford them the same forgiveness? Freja : I... *startled sigh* ...I-I don't know.
Ramattra : My brother wasted too much of his life teaching you. Genji : I agree. Ramattra : Really? Genji : Yes. Like you, I was undeserving of his patience.
Ramattra: Is that... Is that a bow and arrow? Hanzo: Yes. Ramattra: Are firearms not to your taste? Hanzo: They make killing too simple.

Ramattra : I've heard you " Phreaks " modify my kind. Force us to hide, even among outcasts. Hazard : Ravagers come to us for a fresh start. New chassis can go a long way. Ramattra : Towards what? Assimilation? Subservience? Hazard : Nah. That's more your deal, I'd wager.
Ramattra : How delightful, to see human arrogance contradicted. By a cat, no less. Jetpack Cat : *innocent meows*

Ramattra: I hear you like to prey on omnics . Try me. Junker Queen: No, thanks. Fought a buncha you before. You're a bit... gimmicky . No offense. Ramattra: "Gimmicky"? Junker Queen: I said, no offense!

Junkrat: How come you don't stay a big bloke all the time? Ramattra: I prefer tactical precision over brute force. Junkrat: Oh, likewise, likewise. Some of my favorite bombs are extraordinarily precise!

Junkrat: Jamison Fawkes, reporting live. Let's ask this scary metal bloke how he thinks the battle's gonna go! Ramattra: You are not a journalist. Junkrat: A... puzzling prognostication. Now back to Natasha for a look at the weather!
Juno : You remind me of the rovers back home! They also change their forms depending on the task. Ramattra : Rovers? *sigh* Human ignorance is truly boundless.

Lúcio: So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Ramattra: Ants. They build marvelous structures and cooperate when threatened. I find them... inspirational. Lúcio: Uh... yeah, I can see it.
Lúcio : I haven't forgotten about what you do to Rio. Ramattra : I'm glad your memory is intact. Let's get on with this.
Ramattra : It must gall you, working with me. Keeping me alive. Mercy : I don't want anyone to die. Not even you.

Ramattra: Your... willingness, to experiment on your own kind... fascinates me, Doctor. Why do you do it? Moira: I'm surprised you have to ask. We have an enemy in common. Ramattra: Overwatch ? Moira: No. Mortality.

Ramattra: So, you were the one leading the fight against my forces in Numbani . Orisa: Yes. A fight you did not attend. Ramattra: Another location demanded my attention. Orisa: Did you fail there too?

Ramattra: How much of the world have you seen? Orisa: Efi has taken me to many wonderful places. Ramattra: Have you ever wanted to make your own path? To leave her behind? Orisa: There is nowhere worth going without her.

Ramattra: Your armor is interesting. What does it use as a power source? Pharah: Planning to steal it for your own designs? Heh, nice try. Ramattra: I was being polite. Frankly, it's a little primitive for my tastes.
Ramattra: You were one of Anubis 's jailers. You should have destroyed it. Pharah: That is... not what I would have expected you to say. Ramattra: Of course not. You humans love your assumptions.
Reinhardt: Putting those vile helmets on your own kind ... Have you no honor? Ramattra: I will not sacrifice my kind to abide by humanity's moral code.

Ramattra: It is surprising that you would resist freedom for omnics. I'd heard you championed our cause. Sojourn: Maybe my optics need calibrating, because I don't see any "freedom" in indoctrination.

Sojourn : Null Sector has a foothold in so many cities... why withdraw your forces now? Ramattra : Would you have preferred I destroy humanity? Sojourn : The way you're consolidating your forces? I think you're still planning on it. Ramattra : I seek liberation, not devastation. I leave such senseless conflict to your kind.
Sombra: So, how much RAM do you have... RAMattra? Ramattra: Do humans find comfort in such petty humor? Sombra: Just trying to break the ice!
Symmetra: Your invasion has left millions in disarray. Ramattra: Harsh words, considering that your corporation benefits at their expense. You're welcome, by the way.
Vendetta : Allying with Doomfist truly was the beginning of your failure. Ramattra : Failure is only a threat to those who see a single path.

Vendetta : You did me a favor by calling your retreat, omnic. It saved me the trouble of killing you myself. Ramattra : Of course. I will gladly stand aside while you goad humanity to tear itself apart.

Venture: I've always wanted to make Aurora 's pilgrimage to the Shambali Monastery ! Ramattra: The monks do not mind humans. What is stopping you? Venture: I don't know. Maybe I have... asthma? Ramattra: *sigh* Asthma.
Ramattra: Tell me, is it true you never miss? Widowmaker: Everyone misses. Ramattra: That wasn't an answer. Widowmaker: I don't owe you one.
Ramattra : From one engineer to another, why a ball? Wrecking Ball : A wheel would fall over. Ramattra : *laughs* Delightful!

Ramattra: Do you remember when we sat up at night, counting stars? Zenyatta: Yes. We wondered how many other omnics were doing the same. Ramattra: Yes, well. I've learned that too few of them look up at all.
Zenyatta: There is a new sadness in you, brother. Ramattra: No. *sigh* I've simply grown tired of pretending I am content. Zenyatta: Perhaps I can share your burden. Ramattra: You already do.

Reinhardt : What did you do, you know, before the Crisis ? Tracer : Tekhartha Zenyatta? If you don't mind me asking... what did you do before the Crisis? Zarya : What was your function before the Crisis? Zenyatta: I collected payments at a laser tag arena. I was a lifeguard at a water park. I served coffee. I drove a tractor. I massaged sheep on a free-range pasture. One of seven: D.Va: Wait, for real? Doomfist: Is that true? Reinhardt: Hahahaha! Is that true? Roadhog: Really? Sigma: Could that be? Tracer: Seriously? Zarya: Really? Ramattra: Ha! I don't think so, but he wouldn't tell me, either.
map-specific: I refuse to die on a movie set. (on respawn)
I lost a brother here, years ago . I hope I haven't lost another .
Just as Anubis opened the gates of death, I will exhaust myself to keep them shut.
